name: 26.2qt Heavy Duty Storage Bin - Brightroom™: Black Plastic, Stackable & Portable, Universal Storage Solution
description:
Bring order to your garage, basement, or mudroom with the Brightroom Heavy-Duty Storage Bin. This durable plastic storage container features an open top design for easy, everyday access, keeping tools, sporting gear, and gardening supplies visible and within reach. The rugged construction with a textured finish wipes clean easily, while tabs at the base and a grooved rim allow bins to stack securely within the collection. Stack the two sizes to create a custom organization system that fits your shelves, workbenches, or mudroom spaces.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
